description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.
description_zh: 基于Rust的快速无头浏览器自动化CLI，支持Node.js回退，允许AI代理通过结构化命令执行页面导航、点击、输入和快照操作。
name: Agent Browser

description: Google Workspace CLI for Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Contacts, Sheets, and Docs.
description_zh: Google Workspace 命令行工具，支持 Gmail、日历、云端硬盘、通讯录、表格和文档。
name: Gog

description: Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced queries.
description_zh: 使用 `gh` CLI 与 GitHub 交互，通过 `gh issue`、`gh pr`、`gh run` 和 `gh api` 管理议题、PR、CI 运行及高级查询。
name: Github

description: Automatically update Clawdbot and all installed skills once daily. Runs via cron, checks for updates, applies them, and messages the user with a summary of what changed.
description_zh: 每日自动通过cron检查并更新Clawdbot及所有已安装技能，应用后向用户发送变更摘要。
name: Auto-Updater Skill

description: Connect to 100+ APIs (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, GitHub, Notion, Slack, Airtable, HubSpot, etc.) with managed OAuth. Use this skill when users want to...
description_zh: 通过托管OAuth连接100+ API（Google Workspace、Microsoft 365、GitHub、Notion、Slack、Airtable、HubSpot等）。当用户想要...时使用此技能。
name: API Gateway

description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.
description_zh: 用于创建有效技能的指南。当用户希望创建新技能（或更新现有技能），以通过专业知识、工作流或工具集成扩展Claude能力时使用。
name: Skill Creator

description: AI-powered platform for rapid full-stack app development, autonomous agents, workflow automation, and scalable product creation with low-code and AI integrat...
description_zh: AI驱动的全栈应用快速开发平台，支持自主智能体、工作流自动化、低代码及AI集成，实现可扩展产品创建。
name: CodeConductor.ai

description: Use the mcporter CLI to list, configure, auth, and call MCP servers/tools directly (HTTP or stdio), including ad-hoc servers, config edits, and CLI/type generation.
description_zh: 使用 mcporter CLI 直接列出、配置、认证和调用 MCP 服务器/工具（HTTP 或 stdio），支持临时服务器、配置编辑及 CLI/类型生成。
name: Mcporter

description: Ultimate AI agent memory system for Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT & Copilot. WAL protocol + vector search + git-notes + cloud backup. Never lose context again. Vibe-coding ready.
description_zh: Cursor/Claude/ChatGPT/Copilot终极AI记忆系统：WAL协议+向量搜索+Git笔记+云端备份，上下文永续，Vibe编码就绪。
name: Elite Longterm Memory

description: Clawdbot documentation expert with decision tree navigation, search scripts, doc fetching, version tracking, and config snippets for all Clawdbot features
description_zh: Clawdbot文档专家，支持决策树导航、搜索脚本、文档获取、版本追踪及配置片段，涵盖所有功能
name: Clawdbot Documentation Expert

description: Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.
description_zh: 使用 ffmpeg 提取视频帧或短片段。
name: Video Frames

description: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with w...
description_zh: 自动执行浏览器操作，支持网页测试、表单填写、截图及数据提取。适用于网站导航与交互场景。
name: Browser Use

description: Headless browser automation CLI optimized for AI agents with accessibility tree snapshots and ref-based element selection
description_zh: 专为AI智能体优化的无头浏览器自动化CLI，支持无障碍树快照与引用式元素选择
name: Agent Browser

description: Use CodexBar CLI local cost usage to summarize per-model usage for Codex or Claude, including the current (most recent) model or a full model breakdown. Trigger when asked for model-level usage/cost data from codexbar, or when you need a scriptable per-model summary from codexbar cost JSON.
description_zh: 使用 CodexBar CLI 本地成本数据汇总 Codex/Claude 各模型使用（含当前或完整细分）。在询问 CodexBar 模型级使用/成本数据，或需可脚本化各模型摘要时触发。
name: Model Usage

description: Monitor blogs and RSS/Atom feeds for updates using the blogwatcher CLI.
description_zh: 使用 blogwatcher CLI 监控博客和 RSS/Atom 订阅源的更新。
name: Blogwatcher

description: Efficient, secure agent-to-agent communication protocol. 40-60% token reduction, built-in privacy, Ed25519 signatures.
description_zh: 高效安全的智能体通信协议，节省40-60%token，内置隐私，支持Ed25519签名。
name: Molt Speak

description: Browser automation via Playwright MCP server. Navigate websites, click elements, fill forms, extract data, take screenshots, and perform full browser automation workflows.
description_zh: 通过Playwright MCP服务器实现浏览器自动化，支持网页导航、元素点击、表单填写、数据提取、截图及完整工作流执行。
name: Playwright MCP

description: Use the ClawdHub CLI to search, install, update, and publish agent skills from clawdhub.com. Use when you need to fetch new skills on the fly, sync installed skills to latest or a specific version, or publish new/updated skill folders with the npm-installed clawdhub CLI.
description_zh: 通过 npm 安装的 ClawdHub CLI，用于在 clawdhub.com 搜索、安装、更新和发布 Agent 技能。支持即时获取新技能、将已安装技能同步至最新或特定版本，以及发布新/更新的技能文件夹。
name: Clawdhub

description: Expert frontend design guidelines for creating beautiful, modern UIs. Use when building landing pages, dashboards, or any user interface.
description_zh: 专业前端设计指南，打造精美现代UI，适用于落地页、仪表盘及任意用户界面。
name: SuperDesign

description: Automate web browser interactions using natural language via CLI commands. Use when the user asks to browse websites, navigate web pages, extract data from websites, take screenshots, fill forms, click buttons, or interact with web applications.
description_zh: 通过自然语言CLI命令自动化浏览器交互。适用于浏览网站、页面导航、数据提取、截图、表单填写、按钮点击及网页应用操作。
name: Browser Automation

description: Local search/indexing CLI (BM25 + vectors + rerank) with MCP mode.
description_zh: 本地搜索/索引CLI（BM25+向量+重排序），支持MCP模式
name: Qmd

description: Essential Docker commands and workflows for container management, image operations, and debugging.
description_zh: Docker 核心命令与工作流：容器管理、镜像操作及调试。
name: Docker Essentials

description: Designs and outputs n8n workflow JSON with robust triggers, idempotency, error handling, logging, retries, and human-in-the-loop review queues. Use when you need an auditable automation that won’t silently fail.
description_zh: 设计并输出含可靠触发、幂等性、错误处理、日志、重试及人工审核队列的 n8n 工作流 JSON。适用于需审计且防静默失败的自动化场景。
name: n8n workflow automation

description: API-first email platform designed for AI agents. Create and manage dedicated email inboxes, send and receive emails programmatically, and handle email-based workflows with webhooks and real-time events. Use when you need to set up agent email identity, send emails from agents, handle incoming email workflows, or replace traditional email providers like Gmail with agent-friendly infrastructure.
description_zh: 面向AI智能体的API优先邮件平台。创建和管理专用邮箱，以编程方式收发邮件，通过Webhook和实时事件处理邮件工作流。适用于为智能体设置邮件身份、发送邮件、处理收件工作流，或替代Gmail等传统邮件服务商。
name: AgentMail
